title: Amtech - Assorted Wooden Dowels Set for Home DIY, Furniture Assembly, Woodworking, and More, Durable, Long Lasting, Provides Stability, Easy to Use (90pcs)
features: DIY & WOODWORKING STAPLE: The assorted wooden dowel set is ideal for a wide range of woodworking tasks, such as furniture assembly and repair, cabinetmaking, reinforcements, model making, crafting, and smaller projects like home decor.

DURABLE: The high-quality wooden dowels provide long lasting stability for your peace of mind. They’re easy to use and there’s no need for specialist tools - they’re a must-have for both professionals and DIYers.
VERSATILE: Includes a variety of sizes so that you have the right one for your task; 30pcs 6mm x 30mm, 30pcs 8mm x 40mm, and 30pcs 10mm x 40mm.
3 YEAR WARRANTY: We work hard to make sure our tools are reliable for any task. That’s why all our hand tools are backed by a three year product replacement warranty.
DIY KNOW HOW: At Amtech, we want to improve every home and life by making DIY a doddle for every generation and skill level with tools and expertise that you can rely on.
description: Product Description The high-quality wooden dowels provide a reliable performance and long lasting use to provide stability and peace of mind. Ideal for both professional and DIY woodworkers, the dowels cater to various skill levels and project needs. They’re perfect for a wide range of woodworking tasks, such as furniture assembly and repair, cabinetmaking, reinforcements, model making, crafting, and smaller projects like home decor. The variety of dowel sizes ensures that you have the right size for your task. ✓ 30pcs 6mm x 30mm ✓ 30pcs 8mm x 40mm ✓ 30pcs 10mm x 40mm
